payload.topic: Here is my rough draft: 'The city planted more trees and solved heat risk.' Give me feedback on whether my evidence use matches the source.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, I will stay in feedback mode on your draft so you can keep your ideas and revise it in your own words.
